name: Savory Granola Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together oats, flour, almonds, wheat germ, sesame seeds, honey, oregano, thyme, and onion powder.
2. With a fork, beat together eggs and oil. Stir into the oat mixture.
3. Grease a 10 X 15 inch jelly roll pan.
4. Using a spatula, press dough evenly into the prepared pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 20 minutes, until golden.
6. Cut into 1 1/2 inch squares, then cut each square into triangles.
7. Remove to a rack and cool. Store in an airtight container.
These unusual crackers will keep several weeks at room temperature, and several months in the refrigerator or freezer.
